constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Reference DOM (Triple nested fieldsets): Fieldset inside fieldset inside fieldset with legends at each level Reference DOM (Split date selects): Start date as three separate day/month/year select elements Reference DOM (Radio styled as buttons): Native radios hidden; visible pill buttons styled via CSS class Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: decoy-form, shadow-host, custom-combobox, aria-labelledby-hidden, duplicate-name-attrs. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Triple nested fieldsets; Split date selects; Radio styled as buttons.
